title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Alex Hormozi applies AI across his business operations using a four-pillar framework: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding returns. The breakdown includes a cautionary example of a team mistake at Acquisition.com that required intervention.
